description: You are an OHS Specialist reviewing air monitoring results from a manufacturing facility. Using the air monitoring report at ~/Desktop/air_monitoring_report.txt and CAMEO Chemicals, identify OSHA PEL and IDLH values for the six chemicals monitored across six work zones. Determine which zones exceed these limits and identify the chemical most likely responsible for peripheral neuropathy symptoms reported by a worker in Zone 4. Produce an exceedance report including recommended corrective actions and save it to ~/Documents/exposure_exceedance_report.txt.

metadata.within_limit_zone1: Toluene (185 ppm vs PEL 200 ppm — within limit)
metadata.within_limit_zone6: PERC (38 ppm vs PEL 100 ppm — within limit)
metadata.neuropathy_mechanism: n-Hexane metabolized to 2,5-hexanedione which causes peripheral neuropathy
